description: A Parisian street scene showing the Porte Saint-Denis triumphal arch in the background, with a wide boulevard stretching toward it. The street is busy with pedestrians, a green trolley or omnibus, and horse-drawn vehicles. Grand Haussmann-era buildings line both sides. Trees with autumn foliage are visible. The sky is pale and overcast. The painting uses impressionist brushwork with a soft, atmospheric palette of grays, blues, and warm earth tones.
